categories.name: Online Presence

criteria.description: No website, no GMB, no social media
Has basic website but outdated (2+ years)
Has website OR GMB, not both
Has website + GMB but not optimized
Has website + GMB + some social, needs improvement
Strong online presence — may not need us

categories.notes: Score 2-6 is our sweet spot. 0 = lots of work. 8-10 = may be harder to sell but higher budget.

criteria.description: Just exploring, no timeline
Thinking about it, maybe next quarter
Want to start within a month
Need it within 2 weeks
Critical — losing business now, need it yesterday
Very price-sensitive, wants cheapest option
Has limited budget, may fit Starter only
Can afford Growth tier, value-conscious
Budget aligned with Growth/Scale, sees ROI
Money is not the issue, wants the best solution
Needs committee/board approval
Needs partner/spouse approval
Has influence but needs one other sign-off
Primary decision maker, just being thorough
Sole decision maker, can say yes today
Very small operation, low customer volume
Small but stable, some growth potential
Established business, clear growth opportunity
Growing business, multiple locations or expanding
High-value business, multi-location, strong LTV

0-15.action: Add to nurture drip — not ready yet

16-25.action: Present Starter tier, plant seeds for upgrade

26-35.action: Present Growth tier with ROI justification

36-50.action: Present Scale tier — high-value prospect, close fast

26-35: Send Growth tier proposal within 4 hours
Include ROI calculation specific to their business
Schedule follow-up call for next day
36-50: Send Scale tier proposal immediately (within 1 hour)
Call back same day to close
Offer launch discount to close today
